sglang.title: Refactors radix cache for extra key support
sglang.author: JustinTong0323
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
In specific scenarios, it is necessary to isolate the kvcache for certain requests. For instance, requests utilizing different LoRA adapters, or requests for which we do not desire sharing the kvcache with others(ref #9163).

sglang.title: [4/4] Introduce CachedKernel to reduce CSGMV kernel launch overheads by 60%
sglang.author: lifuhuang
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
After previous optimizations, currently LoRA kernel perf itself has significantly reduced, making the triton kernel launch time one of the main sources of overheads from LoRA. This PR caches compiled triton to bypass the generic but slow cache lookup mechanism in Triton. More relevant dis
